message:
feat(ui): comprehensive visual overhaul with per-tool color theming and new components

Major concurrent agent contribution to the website visual identity:

- app/page.tsx: restructure landing page layout with streamlined
  section ordering and reduced visual clutter (-95/+58)
- app/architecture/page.tsx: expand architecture page with richer
  technical detail sections
- franken-elements.tsx: rework base UI primitives with improved
  animation, glow effects, and color inheritance (+80/-47)
- franken-flywheel.tsx: further refinements to per-tool accent color
  integration and animation timing
- algorithm-card.tsx: expand algorithm showcase cards with richer
  metadata display and hover interactions
- feature-card.tsx: redesign feature cards with accent-colored borders,
  improved typography, and responsive layout
- glow-orbits.tsx: enhance orbital animation with multi-color trails
  and smoother interpolation curves
- memory-dump.tsx: expand memory visualization with additional data
  columns and color-coded status indicators
- optimization-card.tsx: add performance metric callouts and spark
  chart placeholders
- client-shell.tsx: add new client-side rendering boundary
- site-footer.tsx: minor text adjustment
- spec-evolution-lab.tsx: animation timing fixes
- war-story-card.tsx: minor text adjustment
- signal-hud.tsx (new): heads-up display component for real-time
  system signal visualization
- spectral-background.tsx (new): animated spectral gradient background
  component for section backdrops

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
